asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates a multi-agent startup diligence workflow, showcasing research enrichment, public/private agent collaboration, and downstream handoffs with clear UI state changes.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly shows the transition from a shared spreadsheet to a research queue and private agent workspace.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full flow from pending accounts to enrichment, multi-agent execution, and final handoff drafts.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-mode interface is well-structured with clear visual boundaries between the spreadsheet, research tab, and copilot.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom concept of combining spreadsheets, private/public agents, and execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows real-time UI updates, loading states, and trace logs instead of simulated mockups.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, though the trace log in the bottom-left corner is quite small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and GTM teams conducting automated company research and diligence.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts agent processing times, pending states, and the necessity of human approval for handoffs.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet view with live collaboration controls
Research tab showing pending and completed account enrichment
Copilot panel with public/private chat toggle
Multi-agent command execution and trace logs

defects.observed: The trace log text in the bottom-left panel is small and difficult to read at standard browser resolutions.
defects.fix: Increase the font size of the trace log or provide a zoom-in overlay for that section.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run collaborative startup diligence with automated research enrichment, private agent reasoning, and human-in-the-loop handoffs.
